memoryArtifacts.description: The de Trafford family can trace their ancestry back to the 11th century. The main branch was founded by Randolphus, who owned several manors in Lancashire and Cheshire. He died around 1050, sixteen y …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Trafford於大約1264年出生在英國藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾時，他的父親Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford44歲，母親Margaret36歲。他於1291年與Agnes在英國藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1324年11月8日在他的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Trafford于大约1264年出生在英国藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾时，他的父亲Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford44岁，母亲Margaret36岁。他于1291年与Agnes在英国藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1324年11月8日在他的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Trafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Trafford (Lancashire), Trafford in Chipping Warden (Northamptonshire), and Bridge, Mickle, and Wimbolds Trafford (Cheshire). The Northamptonshire placename probably derives from Old English træppe ‘trap’ + ford ‘ford’. The Cheshire placenames derive from Old English trōg ‘trough’ + ford. The Lancashire placename is a development of Stretford (Lancashire); most cases of the surname probably derive from this place. Early members of the de Trafford family, recorded here from the 13th century, were also recorded in medieval documents as de Stratford(e). Both the surname and the placename lost the initial S-. The manor of Trafford was carved out of Stretford township, and perhaps because its manor house was located at some distance from Stretford village, Trafford was adopted for the new settlement from an early date. See also Stratford .

variants.name: Stratford
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Stratford, for example in Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Middlesex, Northamptonshire, Suffolk, Warwickshire, and Wiltshire, from Old English strǣt ‘Roman road’ (see Street ) + ford ‘ford’.

habitational name principally from Strafford Sands (now lost) in Mexborough (Yorkshire), presumed to be the ancient meeting-place of Strafforth Wapentake, and deriving from the same source as 1 above.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Trafford was born about 1264, in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, his father, Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford, was 44 and his mother, Margaret, was 36. He married Agnes in 1291, in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 November 1324, in his hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Trafford est né environ 1264, à Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Agnes en 1291, à Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1324, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Trafford um 1264 in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford 44 und seine Mutter Margaret 36. Er hat 1291 in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England Agnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. November 1324 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Trafford è nato il circa 1264 nel Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Agnes nel 1291, nel Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 novembre 1324, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Traffordが約1264年にイギリスランカシュアイアトラフォード マノーで生まれた時，父Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretfordは44歳，母Margaretは36歳であった。1291年にイギリスランカシュアイアトラフォード マノーでAgnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1324年11月8日に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Trafford(이)가 대략 1264년 영국 랭카실르 트래퍼드 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1291년 영국 랭카실르 트래퍼드 먼어에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1324년 11월 8일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Trafford nasceu aproximadamente 1264, em Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes em 1291, em Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1324, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Trafford родился около 1264 г. в местности траффорд манор, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes в 1291 г. в местности траффорд манор, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 ноября 1324 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Trafford nació aproximadamente 1264, en Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Agnes en 1291, en Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1324, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
